All eight rate constants are squared (nonnegative), and every denominator is `1 + nonnegative`, so it is smooth and singularity-free over the full input range. `c0` (plateau) is kept unsquared but initialized near 1 so `capacity = c0 - c` stays positive on normalized data. `cd=0` exactly recovers uninhibited kinetics (both factors → 1), preserving the required cd=0 behavior. 9 constants is within the stability limit and the requested initial values give a gentle starting point for least-squares.
